name: UFPR-SR-Plates
annotation: 5 LR + 5 HR sequential frames + plate text
description: 100K LP images in 10K tracks from real-world surveillance. Each track: 5 LR frames (vehicle far) + 5 HR frames (vehicle close). Sequential capture for multi-frame super-resolution.
resolution: LR (far from camera) + HR (close to camera), real surveillance
